title: Collector
overview: Kyōma Mabuchi, a Collector, runs into some trouble on a job and ends up bringing back an android girl named Mira.

title: Loser
overview: Kyōma and his new partner, Mira, are after the art thief Loser's illegal coils, but what is Loser really after?

title: Chase the Numbers
overview: Mira finally settles into life at the gasoline stand, but will New Tesla find out her secret after an incident with some neighborhood kids?

title: The Mystery Hidden in Lake Yasogami
overview: Kyōma and Mira end up at a village with a dark past after Albert asks them to investigate the mysterious death of novelist Shijuro Sakaki.

title: The Possibilities of the Dead
overview: Mira is trapped in the past as Kyōma and the others fight against the ghosts in the fog attacking the hotel.

title: The Wind of Africa
overview: Prince Salva-Enna-Tibesti, CEO of Islero and COO of Central 60, visits Central 47 with his younger brother, Lwai, who loves Japan.

title: The Voice Calling from the Past
overview: Kyōma recalls his past as he gets ready to join the other Collectors on Easter Island.

title: The Island That Fell into Nothingness
overview: Kyōma and the other Collectors are on Easter Island in a race to collect the special coil that Prince Salva is after.

title: The Key to Adrastea
overview: Kyōma and Salva enter their memories as they and Loser remember their pasts and put more pieces of the puzzle together.

title: Resurrected Nightmare
overview: Kyōma starts to connect the dots as he fights with an old comrade controlled by K.K., and the truth is revealed about Lwai.

title: The Lost Genesis
overview: Loser shows the others his memories, and Kyōma starts to remember more of his past as they search for the lost coil, Genesis.

title: The Future Reached
overview: Mira helps Kyōma put the pieces of his memories back together as they all fight to bring down Seameyer together.
